name: grubspot
description: GrubSpot is a comprehensive Mess Finder and Management application designed to bridge the gap between mess owners and students/professionals looking for daily meal services.

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
